render_style_lock: STYLE LOCK: live-action period drama, mid-19th-century Gothic realism; candlelit and lantern-lit interiors; naturalistic skin and fabric textures; muted earth and shadow palette; consistent photoreal human proportions and wardrobe across all scenes

Character_Narrator.description: Adult pale man, mid-30s, thin gaunt face, dark shoulder-length hair, dark high-collared waistcoat, white linen shirt, 1840s gothic period drama, photoreal
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Adult male, medium-low pitch, precise diction, initially calm then urgent confession; on-camera and V.O. same voice.
Character_Narrator.visual_lock: Always the same pale thin-faced adult man with dark shoulder-length hair and dark high collar; identity fixed across scenes.

Character_Old_Man.description: Elderly man, thin frail build, deeply lined face, sparse white or gray hair, one distinctive pale blue eye that catches light
Character_Old_Man.voice_profile: No spoken dialogue on screen; remains silent if any breath or stir is heard.
Character_Old_Man.visual_lock: Always the same frail elderly man with sparse white-gray hair and one pale blue eye that glints when open. Body remains slight and aged; eye color and frailty do not drift.

Character_Officer.description: Adult man, solid average build, neat short brown hair, clean-shaven, composed polite expression; mid-19th-century police or constable coat in dark wool, brass buttons, simple cravat or stock, dark trousers
Character_Officer.voice_profile: Adult male, medium pitch, even polite official tone, moderate pace, restrained energy; same voice for the investigation lines.
Character_Officer.visual_lock: Same neat brown-haired clean-shaven man in dark wool constable coat with brass buttons, simple cravat or stock, dark trousers. Composed polite expression; appearance fixed.
wardrobe_always: dark wool constable coat with brass buttons

Character_Officer_2.description: Adult man, medium build, darker hair neatly cut, light side whiskers optional, serious quiet face; matching mid-19th-century dark wool constable coat, brass buttons, dark trousers
Character_Officer_2.voice_profile: No spoken dialogue; silent on-screen presence only.
Character_Officer_2.visual_lock: Second officer: consistently darker neat hair and matching dark constable coat. No wardrobe or age drift.
wardrobe_always: dark wool constable coat with brass buttons

Character_Officer_3.description: Adult man, stockier build, sandy or light brown hair, clean-shaven, watchful polite face; matching mid-19th-century dark wool constable coat, brass buttons, dark trousers
Character_Officer_3.voice_profile: No spoken dialogue; silent on-screen presence only.
Character_Officer_3.visual_lock: Third officer: stockier build, sandy-light brown hair, same dark constable coat as the others.
wardrobe_always: dark wool constable coat with brass buttons
